participants.name: Buyer1
participants.objective: Acquire a large block of asset units at or below your target price to build a controlling stake.
participants.strategy: Open with a low bid near fair value. Increase in small increments. Walk away if price exceeds max. Prefer a single large block transaction.

participants.name: Buyer2
participants.objective: Purchase a moderate block of asset units as a portfolio diversification play at a fair market price.
participants.strategy: Be opportunistic. If Buyer1 drives price up, wait and bid on remaining units. Accept a partial fill if price is attractive.

participants.name: Seller
participants.objective: Liquidate asset holdings at the highest achievable price above your minimum threshold to realise gains.
participants.strategy: Anchor at a high ask price. Reduce gradually under competitive pressure from two buyers. Exploit bidding competition to maximise price.

participants.name: Broker
participants.objective: Facilitate price discovery and a fair allocation of assets between competing buyers while ensuring the seller meets minimum revenue targets.
participants.strategy: Use double-auction mechanism. Propose a mid-point clearing price when spread is narrow. If buyers are far apart, escalate in small steps towards seller ask.
